title: Auto-import form submissions into a database
instructions: Use a webhook from your form provider (Typeform, Google Forms, JotForm) to POST new submissions to a small Flask/Express endpoint. On receipt, validate required fields and INSERT into Postgres/MySQL via an ORM (SQLAlchemy, Prisma). Add a unique constraint on submission ID to make the insert idempotent so retried webhooks don't duplicate rows.

title: Merge multiple CSV/Excel exports into one master sheet
instructions: Use pandas: `pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in file_list])`, then `.drop_duplicates(subset=['id'])` and write out with `to_excel`/`to_csv`. Schedule with a cron job or `schedule` library to run nightly against a watched folder.

title: Extract line items from PDF invoices
instructions: Use `pdfplumber` or AWS Textract to pull table data from incoming PDFs, normalize into a DataFrame, and insert into the accounting system's API. For inconsistent layouts, train a lightweight regex/heuristic parser per vendor template rather than one universal parser.

title: Digitize handwritten/scanned forms
instructions: Run scans through Tesseract OCR or a cloud OCR API (Google Vision, AWS Textract), post-process with regex field extraction, then write validated rows to the target system via its REST API.

title: Send transactional confirmation emails automatically
instructions: Hook into your checkout/order event (webhook or DB trigger) and call a transactional email API (SendGrid, Postmark, AWS SES) with a templated payload. Store send status in an events table for auditability.

title: Automated overdue invoice reminders
instructions: Run a scheduled job (cron, Celery beat, or Zapier schedule trigger) that queries invoices where `due_date < now() - interval '7 days' AND status = 'unpaid'`, then sends a reminder email via your email API for each match, logging a `reminder_sent_at` timestamp to prevent duplicate sends.

title: Scheduled newsletter send to subscriber list
instructions: Use an ESP (Mailchimp, SendGrid Marketing Campaigns) API or a scheduled script pulling the subscriber list from your database and sending via a bulk email endpoint with rate-limit backoff. Segment lists first to keep delivery reputation healthy.

title: Keyword-based shared inbox routing
instructions: Use Gmail/Outlook API push notifications or IMAP polling; run incoming subject/body through a keyword classifier (simple regex rules or a small text classifier) and forward/label via the mail API based on the matched department.

title: Auto-create recurring calendar events
instructions: Use Google Calendar API / Microsoft Graph API to create a recurring event with an RRULE (e.g. weekly on Monday). Attach the attendee list programmatically and let the calendar provider handle reminder notifications natively.

title: Automatic meeting room booking
instructions: Listen for calendar event creation via a webhook/push channel, then call the room-resource booking API (Google Calendar resource rooms, or Robin/Teem) to reserve the nearest available room matching attendee count.

title: Pre-meeting reminder notifications
instructions: Use the calendar provider's native reminder settings, or a scheduled job that queries events starting in the next 24h and sends a Slack/email reminder via API to each attendee.

title: Auto-generate invoices on project completion
instructions: On a 'project completed' status change event, call your invoicing API/library (Stripe Invoicing, QuickBooks API) with line items pulled from the project's billed hours/expenses table, then email the generated PDF to the client contact.

title: Daily bank transaction reconciliation
instructions: Pull transactions via the Plaid API (or bank CSV export), match against open invoices/ledger entries by amount+date+reference using fuzzy matching (`thefuzz` library), and auto-mark exact matches as reconciled while flagging ambiguous ones for review.

title: Automated payroll calculation from timesheets
instructions: Pull hours from the timesheet system's API, apply pay rate rules in a small rules engine (dict of rate tiers + overtime multiplier), and push computed totals to the payroll provider's API (Gusto, ADP) for review before disbursement.

title: Automated weekly sales report generation
instructions: Schedule a script (cron/Airflow) that runs a SQL query against the sales table, loads results into pandas, formats into an Excel template with `openpyxl`, and emails/Slacks the report automatically every Monday morning.

title: Daily analytics snapshot into tracking sheet
instructions: Use the Google Analytics Data API (or Mixpanel/Amplitude API) to pull daily metrics, append to a Google Sheet via the Sheets API or a database table, and chart automatically with a connected dashboard (Looker Studio, Metabase).

title: Nightly duplicate-record detection
instructions: Run a scheduled SQL job using `GROUP BY` on likely-duplicate key fields (email, phone) with `HAVING COUNT(*) > 1`, or use a fuzzy-matching library for near-duplicates, and write flagged rows to a review queue table.

title: Hourly service uptime monitoring
instructions: Use a monitoring tool (UptimeRobot, Pingdom, or a simple `requests`-based cron script) to hit a health-check endpoint hourly, log status/latency to a table or time-series DB (InfluxDB), and alert via Slack webhook on failure.

title: Rule-based transaction approval/flagging
instructions: Encode approval rules as a decision table (amount thresholds, velocity checks, blocklist match) evaluated in a small rules engine; auto-approve when all rules pass, auto-flag to a human review queue otherwise. Log every rule outcome for auditability.

title: Keyword-based resume pre-screening
instructions: Parse resumes with `pdfplumber`/`python-docx`, check for required keywords/years-of-experience patterns via regex or a small NLP model, and pass a shortlist plus a match-score to the hiring manager's dashboard.

title: Automated support ticket triage
instructions: Use a rules engine or a lightweight text classifier (scikit-learn on ticket text + customer tier metadata) to assign priority labels automatically in your helpdesk API (Zendesk, Freshdesk), routing based on the resulting tier.

title: Keyword-based ticket auto-tagging
instructions: On new ticket webhook, run subject/body through a keyword-to-tag mapping (or a trained multi-label classifier), then call the helpdesk API's tagging endpoint to apply matched tags automatically.

title: Auto-archive stale tickets/records
instructions: Schedule a job that queries records where `status = 'closed' AND updated_at < now() - interval '90 days'`, then calls the archive/soft-delete endpoint of the source system in a batch.

title: Cross-platform social media posting
instructions: Use Buffer/Hootsuite's API, or individual platform APIs (Twitter API v2, Meta Graph API, LinkedIn API), to publish the same scheduled post across all platforms from a single content calendar entry via a scheduled job.

title: Automated nightly database backups
instructions: Schedule `pg_dump`/`mysqldump` via cron or a managed backup service, upload the artifact to S3/GCS with lifecycle rules for retention, and send a Slack webhook notification on success/failure.

title: Auto-retry failed background jobs
instructions: Use your job queue's built-in retry policy (Celery `retry`, Sidekiq retry, BullMQ backoff) with exponential backoff, and page/Slack-alert only after N consecutive failures to avoid alert fatigue.

title: Scheduled API credential rotation
instructions: Use a secrets manager (AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault) with built-in rotation Lambdas/scripts on a cron schedule; update dependent services via their config-reload API rather than restarting them.
